name: ColorHSV
summary: Represents an HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) color with double precision floating point channels. HSV colors (also sometimes called HSB, where B means Brightness) are similar to HSL colors in that they represent colors in a cylindrical color space, and are intended to provide intuitive means to edit the brightness of a particular color over RGB color space where each color channel would need to be modified to affect the color brightness.

constructors.name: ColorHSV(Color)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorHSV that is equivalent to an ARGB color.
constructors.remarks: Exact conversions between color spaces are often not possible.

constructors.name: ColorHSV(Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorHSV(double hue, double saturation, double value)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorHSV with custom channel values.

params.name: hue
params.doc: Hue channel value. Hue channels rotate between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: saturation
params.doc: Saturation channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: value
params.doc: Value (Brightness) channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

constructors.name: ColorHSV(Double, Double, Double, Double)
constructors.signature: public ColorHSV(double alpha, double hue, double saturation, double value)
constructors.summary: Constructs a new instance of ColorHSV with custom channel values.

params.name: alpha
params.doc: Alpha channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: hue
params.doc: Hue channel value. Hue channels rotate between 0.0 and 1.0.

params.name: saturation
params.doc: Saturation channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

params.name: value
params.doc: Value (Brightness) channel value. Channel will be limited to 0~1.

methods.name: CreateFromCMYK
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSV equivalent of a CMYK color.

returns.doc: The HSV equivalent of the CMYK color.

methods.name: CreateFromHSL
methods.summary: Constructs the nearest HSV equivalent of an HSL color.

returns.doc: The HSV equivalent of the HSL color.

methods.name: CreateFromLAB
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSV equivalent of a LAB color.

returns.doc: The HSV equivalent of the LAB color.

methods.name: CreateFromLCH
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSV equivalent of a LCH color.

returns.doc: The HSV equivalent of the LCH color.

methods.name: CreateFromRGBA
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSV equivalent of a RGBA color.

returns.doc: The HSV equivalent of the RGBA color.

methods.name: CreateFromXYZ
methods.summary: Create the nearest HSV equivalent of an XYZ color.

returns.doc: The HSV equivalent of the XYZ color.

methods.name: ToArgbColor
methods.summary: Convert HSV color to an equivalent System.Drawing.Color.

methods.name: Implicit(ColorHSV to Color)
methods.signature: public static implicit operator Color (ColorHSV hsv)
methods.summary: Implicitly converts a ColorHSV in a .Net library color.

properties.name: A
properties.summary: Gets or sets the alpha channel value. Alpha channels are limited to a 0~1 range.

properties.name: H
properties.summary: Gets or sets the hue channel value. Hue channels rotate between 0.0 and 1.0.

properties.name: S
properties.summary: Gets or sets the saturation channel value. Saturation channels are limited to a 0~1 range.

properties.name: V
properties.summary: Gets or sets the value (brightness) channel value. Value channels are limited to a 0~1 range.
